paper.title_en: Entanglement and geometric transitions in topological string theory
paper.abstract_en: How do we define a bulk subsystem in quantum gravity? In \cite{Wong:2025kpz}, we argued that such a subsystem must support local holographic degrees of freedom. These are gravitational edge modes, whose entanglement creates a backreaction that fuses together subregions of spacetime. In this work we give a realization of these ideas in topological string theory, building upon \cite{Donnelly:2020teo,Jiang:2020cqo}. In this theory, a subsystem for closed strings consists of open strings ending on entanglement branes, which play the role of a dynamical entangling surface. Local holography is implemented by the geometric transition of these branes. We define a subregion open string algebra and develop a diagrammatics for open string modular flow for arbitrary states and subregion. We check that the entanglement entropy of these open strings reproduces the gravitational entropy of the associated closed string background. Finally, we relate these local transitions to defect holography.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文在拓扑弦论中实现了引力纠缠熵的几何过渡，与黑洞热力学中的纠缠熵概念直接相关。
decision.title_zh: 拓扑弦论中的纠缠与几何过渡
decision.abstract_zh: 我们如何在量子引力中定义体子系统？在 \cite{Wong:2025kpz} 中，我们论证这样的子系统必须支持局域全息自由度。这些是引力边缘模，它们的纠缠会产生一个反作用，融合时空的子区域。在这项工作中，我们在拓扑弦论中实现了这些想法，建立在 \cite{Donnelly:2020teo,Jiang:2020cqo} 的基础上。在该理论中，闭弦的一个子系统由开弦组成，这些开弦终止于纠缠膜上，纠缠膜扮演着动态纠缠面的角色。局域全息性通过这些膜的几何过渡得以实现。我们定义了一个子区域开弦代数，并发展了任意态和子区域下开弦模流图的图解法。我们验证了这些开弦的纠缠熵再现了相关闭弦背景的引力熵。最后，我们将这些局部过渡与缺陷全息性联系起来。
